expectations.text: assets contain 'Herbalist'

expectations.evidence: edge 1 + heart 2 + iron 1 + shadow 1 + wits 3 = 8, not 9. The baseline distributed only 8 points (missing one 2 from the 3/2/2/1/1 array)
